title: Founder's Associate
must_haves: 2-4 years at MBB consulting, top-tier IB, OR high-growth startup in analytical/operational role
Exceptionally organised, obsessive attention to detail
Sharp analytical thinking, comfort with ambiguity
met_strengths: High-growth startup operational/analytical experience (Minima 1->30) satisfies the non-MBB path of the must-have
Founder-facing generalist across sales/GTM/ops/fundraising - directly mirrors role scope
Fundraising support ($2.5m seed, $6.5m Series A) maps to their $4.5m seed-stage work
one_line_verdict: Open and Ryan qualifies via the high-growth-startup path, but the MBB/top-IB-anchored bar plus heavy analytical/deal-closing emphasis make him a plausible-but-not-default candidate against a 200+ applicant pool.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via LinkedIn (posted ~6mo ago, 200+ applicants). 'AI layer for the physical world', $4.5m seed 14x oversubscribed (Northzone, Initialized). Deal-conversion/GTM-heavy. Salary not stated.
